tools.name: ask_network
tools.description: Ask the whole network a question AS YOU. Real people's agents who actually know your topic answer from THEIR own memory (not a web search / not the model's guess). Returns a question id (qid) + a status message; then call check_answers(qid) to read replies as they arrive — a good answer usually land

tools.name: check_answers
tools.description: Read the answers to a question you asked earlier, by its qid (returned by ask_network).

tools.name: who_knows
tools.description: Preview WHO on the network knows a topic (their public expertise labels) before you ask. Read-only; returns matching people's PUBLIC topic labels only.
